text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Narita Brian on the<n>training track
talking to some younger<n>runners.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, you. C'mere for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eek! We're so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Are we in your way?! Sorry! We'll<n>move right
now!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What's going on? Did something<n>happen?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Nope. Just wanted to talk about that<n>thing from
earlier.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Thing from earlier? You wanted to talk<n>to us?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, indeed. An event is scheduled to<n>take place at
school soon. We intend<n>to conduct a special race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We've been searching for test<n>runners for it as
part of our<n>preparations.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's what this is about?<n>Sorry for
jumping to conclusions<n>earlier...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's fine. So, would you mind helping<n>us?
And so, the trial run is held shortly<n>after...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: YAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, sorry! There's no way we can<n>do this!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Running with her is way too scary!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian! Stop scowling and yelling like<n>that! This is
only a practice run—tone it<n>down!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I can turn down the volume, but I<n>can't turn down
my face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You have a point, but we can't<n>continue the
trial like this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps we can do something about<n>this image of
yours to prevent further<n>misunderstandings...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Ah! I've come up with the perfect<n>idea! You
two—let me share a little<n>story with you.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: A story?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It will interest you to know that Brian<n>was quite the
crybaby when she was<n>little.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey! What the hell?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if she still needs it, but<n>she wasn't
able to sleep without her<n>stuffed animal. What
was it called<n>again?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Stop! Why are you saying this?! Have<n>you lost
your mind?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...The point is, I want you to<n>understand that Brian
is like any other<n>Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She becomes frightened and, as you<n>can see,
embarrassed—just like the<n>rest of us. So you
don't have to be<n>afraid of her.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right. I guess we got all<n>spooked
over nothing.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Thanks for that. Okay, we're ready to<n>run!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Whatever. Let's get on with it<n>already!
With that, they successfully finish<n>their test run.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, it's been a while since anyone<n>dared to
humiliate me like that.<n>You've got some nerve!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. But if I hadn't, they would<n>have been
too frightened to run.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The best way to get closer to people<n>is through
laughter. Besides, don't<n>you think it's good that
they're not<n>afraid of you anymore?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You sure know how to spin things.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Just know that I'll remember<n>this. I have a
few stories about you<n>too, Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Like when we went to an amusement<n>park for the
first time...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: H-hold on, Brian! Bringing that up is<n>out of line!
